meta.title: The Struggle for Pakistan
meta.description: Hudson Institute hosted a conversation with Dr. Ayesha Jalal about her new book The Struggle for Pakistan: Muslim Homeland and Global Politics. The discussion was moderated by Ambassador Husain Haqqani, Hudson Institute Director for South and Central Asia and former Ambassador of Pakistan to the United States. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
